ast.name: error
ast.source: Clean AI Paste: Shift+V clipboard read failed
ast.target: Clean AI Paste: Shift+V 剪贴板读取失败

ast.name: error
ast.target: Clean AI Paste 插件错误：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Strips out excessive vertical blank lines commonly generated by AI between paragraphs, lists, and sections.
ast.target: 去除AI在段落、列表和章节之间常见的多余垂直空行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically shifts pasted headers down by a specific number of levels. Helps prevent deeply nested pasted text from visually overpowering your main document title.
ast.target: 自动将粘贴的标题下移特定级别数。有助于防止深度嵌套的粘贴文本在视觉上压倒您的主文档标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Converts AI-style LaTeX delimiters \( \) and \[ \] into Obsidian's native $ and $$ formats. Works correctly inside table cells.
ast.target: 将AI风格的LaTeX分隔符 \\( \\) 和 \\[ \\] 转换为Obsidian原生的 $ 和 $$ 格式。在表格单元格内也能正确工作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ensures a blank line both before and after horizontal separators (---) so they render correctly.
ast.target: 确保水平分隔符 (---) 前后都有空行，以便它们能正确渲染。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wraps the pasted text with a hidden start and end tracking comment so you can easily identify AI-generated blocks in Source Mode. These comments are hidden in Read Mode.
ast.target: 用隐藏的开始和结束跟踪注释包裹粘贴的文本，这样您可以在源代码模式下轻松识别AI生成的块。这些注释在阅读模式下是隐藏的。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The string injected at the very top of the AI paste.
ast.target: 注入到AI粘贴内容最顶部的字符串。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The string injected at the very bottom of the AI paste.
ast.target: 注入到AI粘贴内容最底部的字符串。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shows a small popup notice when the plugin successfully formats pasted text.
ast.target: 当插件成功格式化粘贴的文本时，显示一个小的弹出通知。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Paste formatted by Clean AI Paste!
ast.target: 粘贴内容已由 Clean AI Paste 格式化！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Clean AI Paste error: Could not format clipboard data.
ast.target: Clean AI Paste 错误：无法格式化剪贴板数据。
